description: Curator-archetype mid-battle taunts. Voice: fiscal, budget-driven, inventory-focused. Every line sounds like a line item. Speaker is resolved from the active boss at display time (Curator of the Flame, Curator of the Pipeline, Curator of the Null Chamber, etc.).

taunts.text: You are requisitioning more HP than was allocated to you in the current quarter. I will file a variance. The variance will be denied.
Half of you remains. Half of you has been appropriately written down to zero. The loss will be recorded as a non-cash expense. It is essentially a paperwork event.
The budget closes at end of day. You will be zeroed out before it closes. This is not personal. It is consistent. Consistency is the only virtue in the ledger.
Final line item. Expense: you. Coding category: resolved. The books will balance. They always do, in the end.
